essence: Installs boundary and security fencing for residential, commercial, and agricultural sites.

identity.title: Fencing Installer
identity.summary: Sets out, installs, and secures fencing systems, gates, and posts to client specifications and safety standards.

salary.notes: Specialist security fencing installers can command higher rates.

qualifications: Experience in fencing, groundworks, or landscaping
Ability to set out and install posts and panels
Knowledge of materials and fixing methods

lifestyle.description: Outdoor, physical work with travel between sites; often seasonal and project‑based.

habits: Sets out fence lines and posts
